quick: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const required=['README.md','CLAUDE.md','.claude-plugin/plugin.json','.claude-plugin/marketplace.json']; for (const file of required) { if (!fs.existsSync(file)) throw new Error('Missing required file: ' + file); }"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const plugin=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.claude-plugin/plugin.json','utf8')); const marketplace=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.claude-plugin/marketplace.json','utf8')); if (!plugin.name || !String(plugin.name).trim()) throw new Error('Plugin name missing'); if (!Array.isArray(plugin.skills) || plugin.skills.length === 0) throw new Error('Plugin skills missing'); if (!marketplace.id || !String(marketplace.id).trim()) throw new Error('Marketplace id missing'); if (!Array.isArray(marketplace.plugins) || marketplace.plugins.length === 0) throw new Error('Marketplace plugins missing');"
full: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const readme=fs.readFileSync('README.md','utf8'); if (!readme.includes('CLAUDE.md')) throw new Error('README must mention CLAUDE.md'); if (!readme.includes('/plugin install')) throw new Error('README must mention plugin install flow');"
